title: Trap and store pollen
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Trap and store pollen demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Prepare to trap and store pollen

pcs.text: Identify and select suitable floral resources
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify and select suitable floral resources?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify and select suitable floral resources.

pcs.text: Assess colony for suitability for pollen collection according to workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Assess colony for suitability for pollen collection according to workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Assess colony for suitability for pollen collection according to workplace procedures.

pcs.text: Identify health and safety in the workplace hazards and risks and apply appropriate controls
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify health and safety in the workplace hazards and risks and apply appropriate controls?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify health and safety in the workplace hazards and risks and apply appropriate controls.

pcs.text: Select, ensure serviceability, fit and use personal protective equipment
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Select, ensure serviceability, fit and use personal protective equipment?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select, ensure serviceability, fit and use personal protective equipment.

pcs.text: Ensure equipment to be used in the process of collecting pollen is clean and sanitised according to food safety requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Ensure equipment to be used in the process of collecting pollen is clean and sanitised according to food safety requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Ensure equipment to be used in the process of collecting pollen is clean and sanitised according to food safety requirements.

elements.title: Collect pollen

pcs.text: Select and obtain suitable pollen trap equipment and use according to manufacturer instructions

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Collect pollen at frequency according to workplace hive management procedures and quality standards.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Assess risk for pest attack or contamination of pollen and implement corrective action.

pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Assess risk of colony decline and implement corrective action according to hive management procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Assess risk of colony decline and implement corrective action according to hive management procedures.

pcs.text: Store pollen to be transported according to food safety and quality standards and workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Store pollen to be transported according to food safety and quality standards and workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Store pollen to be transported according to food safety and quality standards and workplace procedures.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Treat pollen to prevent fermentation and deterioration and store according to workplace procedures and food safety and quality standards.
